prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 cute 3D cartoon fashion poster featuring two bored kids standing side by side with crossed arms, in a soft Pixar-like and Korean kawaii aesthetic. The background is a muted sage-gray studio backdrop with gentle vignette lighting and a cream floor. Center the children full-body: on the left, a young boy with fluffy brown hair partly visible, oversized plush white winter earmuff headphones, an oversized pastel sage-green T-shirt printed with bold black text “BORED TODAY” and a tiny purple monster graphic, loose dark charcoal cargo jogger pants with side pockets, and chunky white sneakers. On the right, a young girl with long wavy brown hair, oversized plush white winter earmuff headphones, a cropped pastel sage-green T-shirt printed with bold black text “BORED TODAY,” a dark charcoal cargo mini skirt with drawstring and flap pockets, white socks, and chunky white sneakers. Both children should have bored, unimpressed posture with arms folded and feet planted confidently. Add a large hand-drawn sticker-style title at the top reading BORED CLUB, using chunky black bubble letters with thick white outline, slightly tilted. Surround the characters with exactly 9 doodle elements: 5 cream-white hand-sketched stars around the headline, 3 small pastel monster doodles floating around the kids, and 1 speech bubble near the lower left reading NOPE.. Include additional tiny cute monster stickers near the legs and shoes for playful balance, but keep the main visible count of doodle elements clear and uncluttered. Use high-detail toy-like 3D rendering, soft rounded forms, smooth skin, plush fabric texture on the earmuffs, realistic cotton clothing folds, gentle shadows, pastel colors, and a clean magazine-cover composition. Leave the children’s faces intentionally blank or softly obscured as neutral placeholder face areas, while preserving hair, clothing, and body pose. No watermark, no extra logos, no extra readable text beyond the headline, shirt text, and speech bubble.
